home.title: Election Monitoring
home.subtitle: System
home.description: Empowering citizens to report election irregularities and ensure transparent, fair elections through crowdsourced monitoring and real-time analytics.
home.featuresSubtitle: Our platform provides comprehensive tools for election monitoring and reporting
home.updatesSubtitle: Stay informed about the latest developments in our election monitoring efforts
home.secureReportingDesc: Safely report election irregularities with end-to-end encryption and anonymous submission options.
home.realTimeAnalyticsDesc: Access comprehensive data visualization and analytics to track election integrity in real-time.
home.multiRoleAccessDesc: Designed with role-specific dashboards for citizens, observers, analysts, and administrators.
home.transparentMonitoringDesc: An open observation system that allows international observers to verify election processes.
home.systemLaunchDesc: The election monitoring system is now live and accepting reports from citizens nationwide.
home.newAnalyticsDashboardDesc: Comprehensive analytics features added for analysts to track voting patterns and anomalies.
home.observerPortalDesc: Observer login portal now available for accredited election observers.
home.copyright: © 2025 Election Monitoring System. All rights reserved.

login.enterCredentials: Enter your credentials to access your account

about.title: About Election Monitoring System
about.subtitle: Empowering citizens to ensure transparent and fair elections through crowdsourced monitoring and real-time analytics.
about.missionDesc: The election monitoring system is designed to promote election transparency and accountability. We provide a secure platform for citizens, election observers, and analysts where they can report, track, and analyze election irregularities in real-time. Our goal is to ensure every vote is counted and elections are conducted fairly and transparently.

citizen.reportSuccess: Your report has been submitted successfully! Our team will review it soon.

observer.reportsSubtitle: Monitor and verify election reports in your region

analyst.reportsSubtitle: Analyze election data and generate insights
